texto: Getting lost or losing grip gives life meaning and direction. It gives you the opportunity to grow, learn something new and startover. Next time you feel like your failing, slipping or just unsettled in life - take a deep breath - get in the moment of just "being" - feel the life run through your body - stand up and keep going.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Claire Charters: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Getting lost or losing grip gives life meaning and direction. It gives you the opportunity to gro…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, inspirational-quote, gives pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.
